name: Pistachio Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines Yellow Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, eggs, orange juice, cooking oil, and pistachio pudding mix. Blend at low speed for 1 minute.
2. Beat at high speed for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Pour two-thirds of the batter into a greased and floured 12-cup Bundt pan.
4. Add chocolate syrup to the remaining third of the batter and mix at medium speed until well blended.
5. Pour over the top of the batter in the pan. Marbleize by cutting through the batter with a knife.
6. Bake at 350°F for 55-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan for 10-15 minutes. Turn out onto a wire rack or serving plate to complete cooling.
8. Top with Chocolate Glaze:
- In a small bowl, combine sugar, cocoa, and butter. Blend until smooth.
- Add vanilla; stir gradually with milk to achieve desired consistency.
